description: Cut a local release - changelog plus version evidence across completed tracks

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "release"` and any requested version, date, or scope arguments as structured JSON fields.

Review returned completed tracks, release evidence, warnings, proposed artifacts, and current `approval.current_stage` review_bundle target/review paths without inlining large artifacts into model context; manifest_path may be null in target mode.
To write release artifacts, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "release"`, `execute: true`, and `approvalComplete: true`.

For staged release review, approve release_notes, release_metadata, and optional git_actions one stage at a time with approvalSessionId. Release notes should cover highlights, fixes, migrations, risks, and validation evidence when known.
Summarize release scope, version intent, generated artifacts, changed canonical JSON/JSONL state, generated human projections, and remaining blockers.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
